Pompeii, the Roman city buried alive by Mount Vesuvius (Italy)
Machu Picchu, the lost city of the Inca hidden in the clouds (Peru)
Angkor, the vast temple city swallowed by the jungle (Cambodia)
Petra, the rose-red city carved into desert cliffs (Jordan)
Pripyat, the Soviet city abandoned overnight after Chernobyl (Ukraine)
Rapa Nui / Easter Island and the world of the moai builders (Chile)
Derinkuyu, the ancient underground city that sheltered thousands (Turkey)
Kowloon Walled City, the densest place on Earth that was erased (Hong Kong)
Great Zimbabwe, the stone capital of a forgotten African empire (Zimbabwe)
Mohenjo-daro, the great lost city of the Indus Valley civilization (Pakistan)
Cahokia, the lost Native American metropolis on the Mississippi (USA)
Skara Brae, the Stone Age village older than the pyramids (Scotland)
Teotihuacan, the immense city whose builders remain unknown (Mexico)
Varosha, the glamorous resort town sealed off for half a century (Cyprus)
